CustomField.description: Maps to Recurring_Donation__c.RecurringType__c on the Recurring Donation during data import processing. Controls whether the donation is ongoing (Open) or has a defined number of installments (Fixed).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter Open for ongoing donations or Fixed for a specific number of installments. Fixed requires Planned Installments.
CustomField.label: Recurring Donation Recurring Type
